title: schnella alata
intro: Schnella alata, also known as winged schnella, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Schnella alata has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Schnella alata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
